quote.summary: Jufeel International Holdings Limited, formerly Mindtell Technology Limited, is a Malaysia-based information technology (IT) provider. It is engaged in the design, procurement, installation, and maintenance of customized systems applications for corporate customers. Its segments: system integration and development services; IT outsourcing services, and maintenance and consultancy services. Its System integration and development services segment is engaged in the development and customization of corporate IT system applications on a project basis. The IT outsourcing services segment includes performance of specific tasks for development and customization of corporate IT system applications for corporate customers. It also provides maintenance and support for developed IT system applications. Its IT products include NS3 and CUSTPRO. Its customers include banks and financial institutions, governments, educational institutions, IT service firms, and other small and medium enterprises.
